title: Skopeo signing attempts failed on version 1.18.0
body:
### I am trying to sign an image, create a TAR file from it, and upload it to a remote offline server


### Step 1: Copy Nginx Image to OCI Format

```sh
223040566-9094:~/sa/sk # skopeo copy docker://docker.io/library/nginx:latest oci:local_nginx:latest

Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 40a6e9f4e456 done   |
Copying blob 254e724d7786 done   |
Copying blob 3e544d53ce49 done   |
Copying blob d38f2ef2d6f2 done   |
Copying blob 913115292750 done   |
Copying blob 4f21ed9ac0c0 done   |
Copying blob d3dc5ec71e9d done   |
Copying config a830707172 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination

223040566-9094:~/sa/sk #
223040566-9094:~/sa/sk #
```

### Step 2: Sign OCI Image

```sh
223040566-9094:~/sa/sk # skopeo copy --all --sign-by /root/sa/sk/cosign.key --tls-verify=false oci:local_nginx:latest oci:local_nginx_signed:latest

WARN[0000] '--tls-verify' is deprecated, instead use: --src-tls-verify, --dest-tls-verify
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 254e724d7786 done   |
Copying blob 913115292750 done   |
Copying blob 3e544d53ce49 done   |
Copying blob 4f21ed9ac0c0 done   |
Copying blob d38f2ef2d6f2 done   |
Copying blob 40a6e9f4e456 done   |
Copying blob d3dc5ec71e9d done   |
Copying config a830707172 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination

FATA[0001] Cannot determine canonical Docker reference for destination oci:local_nginx_signed:latest

223040566-9094:~/sa/sk #
```

### Step 3: Signing with Sigstore Key

```sh
223040566-9094:~/sa/sk # skopeo copy --src-tls-verify=false --sign-by-sigstore-private-key=/root/sa/sk/cosign.key oci:local_nginx:latest oci:local_nginx_signed:latest

Passphrase for key /root/sa/sk/cosign.key:
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 254e724d7786 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 913115292750 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 3e544d53ce49 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 4f21ed9ac0c0 skipped: already exists
Copying blob d38f2ef2d6f2 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 40a6e9f4e456 skipped: already exists
Copying blob d3dc5ec71e9d skipped: already exists
Copying config a830707172 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination

FATA[0002] Cannot determine canonical Docker reference for destination oci:local_nginx_signed:latest

223040566-9094:~/sa/sk #
```

### Step 4: Copy and Sign CentOS Image

```sh
223040566-9094:~/sa/sk # skopeo copy --all --sign-by /root/sa/sk/cosign.key --tls-verify=false docker://localhost:5000/my-centos-3:1.1 docker://localhost:5000/my-centos-3:signed

WARN[0000] '--tls-verify' is deprecated, instead use: --src-tls-verify, --dest-tls-verify
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 74ddd0ec08fa skipped: already exists
Copying blob 2f61b7909349 skipped: already exists
Copying config 6c3d8ac604 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination
Creating signature: Signing image using simple signing

FATA[0000] creating signature: key "/root/sa/sk/cosign.key" not found
```

comments.body:
> `FATA[0001] Cannot determine canonical Docker reference for destination oci:local_nginx_signed:latest`

`--sign-identity` must be specified for these destinations. But, see containers/image#2602, `oci:`/`oci-archive:` don’t support signatures anyway.

> creating signature: key "/root/sa/sk/cosign.key" not found

That’s not something that can be fixed in Skopeo.

Support for storing signatures in oci: is now tracked in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/186 .

Other aspects of the report can be resolved by changing the invocations of Skopeo.
